info.title: Auto-Tester: .NET Core CLI Continuous Test Runner
info.description: .NET Core global tool continuous test runner that monitors and runs only the tests affected.

x-inspectra.cliParsedTitle: No usable version of libssl was found

options.name: --args-to-dot-net-test
options.description: Additional params to pass to `dotnet run` (eg -v q)

options.name: --maximum-number-of-tests-to-queue
options.description: Maximum number of tests to queue (default 50)

options.name: --use-roslyn
options.description: Use Roslyn to find affected test if possible (BETA)

options.name: --run-all-tests
options.description: Always run all tests when a change is detected
